jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Evok
jsonLd.description:
We at Evok are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Evok:
Evok is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evok!
